title: Spiesia tianschanica
intro: Spiesia tianschanica, also known as Tianschan pea, is a perennial leguminous plant belonging to the Fabaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including gastrointestinal issues and inflammation, due to its numerous health benefits. The bioactive constituents of Spiesia tianshanica include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with this plant are teas and decoctions, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of digestive problems and promote overall well-being.

The classification of Spiesia tianschanica is part of the genus Spiesia, which is a group of plants within the larger rose family.
